apps.name: KelmaMobile
apps.subtitle: Kelma mobile app
apps.localizedDescription: Kelma for iOS with native Anki scheduling and production KelmaSync v2 synchronization.

versions.localizedDescription: Uses KelmaSync's authoritative UTC clock during reconciliation so new and updated cards created in Kelma Immersion are not hidden by a future-skewed local collection timestamp. The Compare screen now follows the same UTC conflict policy.
Adds automatic update discovery at startup and a manual Check for updates control. AltStore remains responsible for the verified iOS installation.
Fixes Compare with server by moving its deck/note manifest, note detail, Accept server, and Force local actions entirely to KelmaSync v2 instead of removed legacy inspect routes.

Fixes Reset & Download: local content, media, and v2 state are deleted on-device while login is preserved, then the collection is restored exclusively through KelmaSync v2 without calling a legacy API route.

More reliable KelmaSync v2 connections with pooled keepalive requests, the canonical sync2.kelma.tech endpoint, automatic migration of existing login tokens, and clearer Kelma Immersion account guidance.
Production KelmaSync v2: fresh restore, note and scheduling updates, media upload/download, mobile-created metadata, deletion propagation, and explicit conflict protection.
